name: Chunky Potato-Leek Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the leeks and margarine in a 2-quart casserole. Cook on High for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring once, until tender.
2. Add the broth, potatoes, salt, and pepper. Cook on High for 4 minutes, stirring twice.
3. Add the corn, dill, Parmesan cheese, and liquid red pepper; stir well. Cook on High for 3 to 4 minutes until potatoes are tender. Let stand, covered, for 3 minutes before serving.
Makes 4 servings.
Per Serving: 111 Calories; 4 g Protein; 2 g Fat; 211 mg Sodium; 20 g Carbohydrates; 1 mg Cholesterol.
